parameters.render_purpose: Full-resolution geometry displayed at render time
parameters.proxy_purpose: Low-poly geometry displayed in viewport for performance
parameters.simproxy_purpose: Low-poly geometry used for physics and collision tools

constraints: Every production asset should have at minimum render + proxy purpose defined.
Render purpose = full-res geometry shown at final render time.
Proxy purpose = low-poly version shown in viewport for interactive performance.
Sim proxy purpose = low-poly version used by physics/collision tools.
Viewport toggle between proxy and render: Glasses icon -> 'Preview' shows proxy, 'Final Render' shows render purpose.
Purpose is set via Component Geometry outputs: 'default' = render, 'proxy' = proxy, 'sim proxy' = sim proxy.
PolyReduce at 5-10% of original is the standard for generating proxy geometry.
test_criteria: In a Component Builder: (1) Wire full-res geo to 'default' output (render purpose). (2) Wire PolyReduce geo to 'proxy' output. (3) Toggle viewport glasses icon between 'Preview' and 'Final Render'. (4) Verify proxy shows low-poly in viewport, render shows full-res at render time.

proxy.when_visible: In viewport when glasses icon set to 'Preview'

simproxy.when_visible: Used by physics and collision systems
simproxy.geometry_quality: PolyReduce 5-10% of original (can share proxy geo)

viewport_toggle.location: Glasses icon in Solaris viewport toolbar
